Penetration Testing Services | Digital Forensics .company <

Find Your Vulnerabilities Before Attackers Do

Automated vulnerability scanners miss what skilled adversaries find. Our penetration testers combine manual exploitation techniques with deep infrastructure knowledge to identify critical security gaps that tools alone cannot detect.

Testing Types

  • External network penetration testing
  • Internal network penetration testing
  • Web application security testing (OWASP Top 10)
  • Cloud infrastructure assessment (AWS, Azure, GCP)
  • Wireless network penetration testing
  • API security testing
  • Mobile application security assessment

Methodology

Every engagement follows a structured methodology based on PTES and OWASP standards, with detailed findings reports that include evidence, risk ratings, and actionable remediation guidance prioritized by business impact.

>

HEROProfessional penetration testing for networks, applications, cloud infrastructure, and wireless environments. Identify vulnerabilities before adversaries exploit them.

Find Your Vulnerabilities Before Attackers Do

Automated vulnerability scanners miss what skilled adversaries find. Our penetration testers combine manual exploitation techniques with deep infrastructure knowledge to identify critical security gaps that tools alone cannot detect.

Testing Types

  • External network penetration testing
  • Internal network penetration testing
  • Web application security testing (OWASP Top 10)
  • Cloud infrastructure assessment (AWS, Azure, GCP)
  • Wireless network penetration testing
  • API security testing
  • Mobile application security assessment

Methodology

Every engagement follows a structured methodology based on PTES and OWASP standards, with detailed findings reports that include evidence, risk ratings, and actionable remediation guidance prioritized by business impact.

Testing Scope

  • Network & Infrastructure
  • Web Applications
  • Cloud Environments
  • Wireless Networks
  • API Security
  • Mobile Apps

Automated vulnerability scanners miss what skilled adversaries find. Our penetration testers combine manual exploitation techniques with deep infrastructure knowledge to identify critical security gaps that tools alone cannot detect.

Testing Types

  • External network penetration testing

  • Web application security testing (OWASP Top 10)
  • Cloud infrastructure assessment (AWS, Azure, GCP)

Every engagement follows a structured methodology based on PTES and OWASP standards, with detailed findings reports that include evidence, risk ratings, and actionable remediation guidance prioritized by business impact.
